name: Cosmo reviewer: respect advisory/continue-on-error red lanes in closure-verification
description: The reviewer's closure-verification pulls the live check-run and fails the close on an advisory (continue-on-error) red lane, with no machine-readable allowed-red signal — it must be cited in WI prose or the close is blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: closure verification treats advisory/continue-on-error red check runs as close-blocking because the reviewer has no structured allowed-red policy to distinguish required lanes from advisory lanes. Variants: (1) required check red must still block close; (2) non-required continue-on-error/advisory lane red must not block when required checks are green; (3) an explicit structured allowed-red policy should replace prose-only exceptions. Regression test: add or update review closure-verification tests in the Cosmo review skill so an advisory-red check passes while a required-red check fails.
